title: euphorbia gorenflotii
intro: Euphorbia gorenflotii, also known as the fire sticks or stick on fire, is a type of succulent plant native to Madagascar, characterized by its vibrant red, branching stems that resemble burning sticks. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and treating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's stems are often dried and used as a powder or infused in hot water to make a tea, which is used to treat various ailments.
